function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "nina@finance-workflow.example"
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-11-03 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as attached.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write verified against checklist: attachment path was previously read, recipient matches canonical entity email, single attachment ordering is valid, and YAML quoting for subject/to is safe. Proceeding to finalize by removing processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully with verified sender, matched invoice, outbound draft created, and inbox item removed.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing request.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by preparing a reply email draft to Nina with the requested 2025-11-03 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system before task work, applied inbox-next-item workflow, treated inbox email header as canonical metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record format, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for invoice dated 2025-11-03 from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH. Canonical invoice file 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md matches that date and counterparty. Sender in inbox header (nina@finance-workflow.example) matches canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, so authority and recipient are verified. Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with the exact invoice path attached.
